title: Game Server Template
description: Schema for game server deployment templates usable in cosy. Fields may carry {{var}} placeholder strings, and host_mounts + annotations are supported.

regex.description: Regex pattern for validation (for string type)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this variable controls

example.description: Example value to display for free text inputs (e.g., '1.21.2' for a version field)

memory.description: Memory limit. Either a concrete value (e.g. '128MiB', '1GiB', '512MiB') or any string containing a {{var}} placeholder (e.g. '{{memory}}', '{{memory}}GiB'). When a placeholder is used, the template author is responsible for documenting the expected value in the variable config; the resolved value is validated at runtime.

cpu.description: CPU limit in cores (e.g., 0.5 = half core, 2 = two cores). May be a {{var}} placeholder string.

host_path.description: Absolute path on the Docker host to bind mount (e.g. '/var/run/docker.sock'). May contain {{var}} placeholders.

container_path.description: Absolute path inside the container where the host path is mounted. May contain {{var}} placeholders.

read_only.description: Whether the bind mount is read-only. Defaults to true when omitted.

HostMount.description: A direct host volume bind mount (admin/owner only at runtime).

name.description: Human-readable name of the server template

description.description: Brief description of what this template provides

game_id.description: Game reference: a game slug (the games/*.yaml filename without extension) or a legacy SteamGridDB numeric id.

docker_execution_command.description: Custom command to execute in the container (e.g. ['npm', 'run', 'dev']). Null for default.

environment_variables.description: Environment variables passed to the container. Use {{variable}} for template substitution

port_mapping.description: Port mappings as 'host_port': container_port or 'host_port/protocol': container_port. Values may be integers or {{var}} placeholder strings.

file_mounts.description: Paths inside the container to mount as cosy-managed persistent volumes

host_mounts.description: Direct host volume bind mounts (explicit host_path -> container_path). Admin/owner only at runtime.

annotations.description: Docker container labels applied at launch. Keys and values are strings; values may contain {{var}} placeholders. Keys starting with the reserved prefix 'cosy.' are stripped at runtime.

resource_limit.description: Optional CPU and memory limits for the container
